_comment: Budget raised 6656->8192 (6.5 KiB -> 8 KiB) when the plugin gained a `meta.icon` (single tree-shaken `Images` glyph from lucide-react, the same per-plugin-bundled convention as export-html/version-history/design-system). lucide-react is a regular dependency project-wide, not externalized, so the one icon lands in the entry chunk (~0.8 kB gzipped). Earlier the easy win was banked by sourcing the version from version.ts instead of importing the whole package.json. Raised again 8192->8704 (8 KiB -> 8.5 KiB) when the public surface gained `isResumableAdapter` (PRD 0004 §5.1 resumable/multipart upload contract): the interfaces are types (erased), but the narrowing helper is a runtime export that lands in the eager entry. Raised again 8704->9216 (8.5 KiB -> 9 KiB) when the PRD 0004 M2 session store (`createUploadSessionStore` + `fingerprintFile`, ~0.47 kB gzipped) was exported from the main barrel. That util has no eager consumer (plugin.ts never imports it), so it COULD move to a lazy subpath (like ./providers/unsplash and ./adapters/s3) to keep the eager entry lean — it lives in the top-level barrel here as a deliberate public-API choice. Further resumable machinery (the M3 runner, M4 S3 resumable adapter) should ship as lazy subpath chunks rather than growing the eager barrel further. 9216 leaves modest headroom while still catching order-of-magnitude regressions.
